MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Daron Tong, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Adriyl Construction and Development Corp, and Bradley Oldenbrook.
Plaintiffs' Witness: Bradley Oldenbrook, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Darren Winnie.
Damages $68,786.22
Principal from loan agreement $6,000.00
Judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc for details breakdown of Judgment.
